trait.name: Deadeye Aim
entries: The marksman can take a bonus action to grant itself advantage on its next ranged weapon attack.

trait.name: Shadow Camouflage
entries: In dim light or darkness, the marksman can attempt to hide as a bonus action, even when being observed.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marksman makes two ranged weapon attacks.

action.name: Shadow Bolt
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) necrotic damage. If the target is in dim light or darkness, it takes an additional 5 necrotic damage.

action.name: Poisoned Dart
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage. The target must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute.

reaction.name: Evasive Maneuver
entries: When a ranged attack against the marksman misses, the marksman can move up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
